parsed.production_notes: The video is a simple, static shot of a real beach scene. No AI artifacts are present.

scenes.setting: Tropical beach, clear blue water, white sand, green vegetation. Bright sunny day.

panels.panel_visual_description: Wide shot of a tropical beach from a high angle. Green plants and rocks are in the left foreground. White sand meets clear turquoise water below. Small figures of people are swimming. The sky is clear blue. Natural, bright sunlight.

scenes.visual_description: Static wide shot of a beach from a cliff. Greenery in the foreground, turquoise water with swimmers below. A large white text box with black text is centered on the screen.
scenes.on_screen_text:
I TOLD MY GRINGO BOYFRIEND
ON MONDAY HE STARTS THE 21-DAY SPANISH IMMERSION CHALLENGE.
AND you should join him.
ON DAY 6 YOU'LL UNDERSTAND IT
ON DAY 13 YOU'LL SPEAK IT
ON DAY 19 YOUR FRIENDS WON'T BELIEVE YOUR ACCENT
ARE YOU IN?
